addPaymentMethodDialog.title.description: Title of the dialog for adding a new payment method (card details).

addPaymentMethodDialog.description.description: Body text of the add-payment-method dialog reassuring the user no charge happens until they confirm the order.

addPaymentMethodDialog.loading.description: Loading text shown while the add-payment-method form (Stripe Elements) is initializing.

addPaymentMethodDialog.unableToLoad.description: Error text shown when the add-payment-method form fails to load.

addPaymentMethodForm.submit.description: Submit button on the add-payment-method form confirming use of the entered payment method.

addPaymentMethodForm.genericError.description: Generic error message shown when submitting the add-payment-method form fails.

addPaymentMethodForm.unexpectedError.description: Fallback error message shown for an unexpected failure submitting the add-payment-method form.

hybridPaymentCard.title.description: Title of the hybrid (balance + credit card) payment method card.

hybridPaymentCard.total.description: Label for the total amount row in the hybrid payment card.

hybridPaymentCard.useAvailableBalance.description: Toggle/label in the hybrid payment card to apply the user's available balance.

hybridPaymentCard.nfscAvailable.description: Hybrid payment card text showing available NFSC balance. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount; keep the 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

hybridPaymentCard.noNfscBalance.description: Hybrid payment card message when the user has no NFSC balance. Keep the literal '$NFSC' token name untranslated.

hybridPaymentCard.balanceBreakdown.description: Heading in the hybrid payment card for the per-wallet/chain balance breakdown.

hybridPaymentCard.creditCard.description: Label for the credit card section in the hybrid payment card.

hybridPaymentCard.x402SignAuthorization.description: Hybrid payment card note that the user will sign a TransferWithAuthorization for an x402 payment. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount; keep 'TransferWithAuthorization', the 'USD' currency code, and the 'x402' protocol name untranslated.

hybridPaymentCard.network.description: Label for the blockchain network selector in the hybrid payment card.

hybridPaymentCard.required.description: Inline badge in the hybrid payment card marking a field as required.

hybridPaymentCard.yourWalletBalance.description: Label in the hybrid payment card for the connected wallet's balance.

hybridPaymentCard.unavailable.description: Status text in the hybrid payment card when a balance/payment option is unavailable.

hybridPaymentCard.insufficientUsdcBalanc.description: Warning in the hybrid payment card that the wallet's USDC balance may be insufficient for the x402 payment. Keep the 'USDC' currency code and 'x402' protocol name untranslated.

hybridPaymentCard.changeCard.description: Button in the hybrid payment card to change the selected credit card.

hybridPaymentCard.addOrSelectCard.description: Button in the hybrid payment card to add or select a saved credit card.

hybridPaymentCard.creditCardOptional.description: Hybrid payment card note that a credit card is optional because the balance covers the order.

hybridPaymentCard.creditCardRequiredForR.description: Hybrid payment card note that a credit card is required for the remaining amount. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount; keep the 'USD' currency code untranslated.

hybridPaymentCard.creditCardRequiredForF.description: Hybrid payment card note that a credit card is required for the full amount.

hybridPaymentCard.paymentCoveredByBalanc.description: Hybrid payment card status indicating the full payment is covered by the user's balance.

hybridPaymentUtils.x402Unavailable.description: Error message when x402 payment is temporarily unavailable. Keep the 'x402' protocol name untranslated.

hybridPaymentUtils.addCreditCard.description: Validation message prompting the user to add a credit card before continuing the payment.

hybridPaymentUtils.calculationError.description: Error message shown when the payment amount calculation fails, asking the user to check their balance and payment method.

multiPaymentCard.title.description: Title of the multi-payment method card (split between NFSC balance and credit card).

multiPaymentCard.nfscBalance.description: Label for the NFSC balance row in the multi-payment card. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

multiPaymentCard.usingNfsc.description: Multi-payment card text for the portion paid from NFSC balance. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount; keep the 'USD' currency code and 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

multiPaymentCard.addNfscBalance.description: Button in the multi-payment card to add/top up NFSC balance. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

multiPaymentCard.creditCard.description: Label for the credit card row in the multi-payment card.

multiPaymentCard.usingCreditCard.description: Multi-payment card text for the portion paid by credit card. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount; keep the 'USD' currency code untranslated.

multiPaymentCard.changeCard.description: Button in the multi-payment card to change the selected credit card.

multiPaymentCard.addOrSelectCard.description: Button in the multi-payment card to add or select a saved credit card.

multiPaymentCard.addCreditCard.description: Button in the multi-payment card to add a credit card.

multiPaymentCard.total.description: Label for the total amount row in the multi-payment card.

multiPaymentHints.nfscToCard.description: Hint encouraging the user to cover the remaining payment with a credit card after using balance.

multiPaymentHints.cardToNfsc.description: Hint encouraging the user to apply existing balance toward part of the payment.

multiPaymentHints.useMultiPayment.description: Button/link to switch to multi-payment (splitting payment across methods).

selectPaymentMethodCard.total.description: Label for the total amount row in the select-payment-method card.

selectPaymentMethodCard.useBalance.description: Toggle/label in the select-payment-method card to pay using available balance.

selectPaymentMethodCard.available.description: Select-payment-method card text showing the available balance. {amount} is a pre-formatted amount including currency — keep untranslated.

selectPaymentMethodCard.useCreditCard.description: Toggle/label in the select-payment-method card to pay using a credit card.

selectPaymentMethodCard.addOrSelectSaved.description: Button in the select-payment-method card to add or select a saved credit card.

selectPaymentMethodCard.noPaymentRequire.description: Message in the select-payment-method card shown when no payment is required (e.g. free order).

selectPaymentMethodCard.summary.description: Heading for the order/payment summary section in the select-payment-method card.

paymentSummary.title.description: Title of the payment summary panel.

paymentSummary.nfscBalance.description: Payment summary line label for the amount paid from NFSC balance. Keep the literal '$NFSC' token name untranslated.

paymentSummary.creditCard.description: Payment summary line label for the amount paid by credit card.

paymentSummary.total.description: Payment summary line label for the total amount.

nfscBalanceDialog.title.description: Title of the NFSC balance dialog. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.description.description: Body text of the NFSC balance dialog describing the available balance across wallets and chains. Keep the literal '$NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.tabOrders.description: Tab label in the NFSC balance dialog for recent NFSC orders. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.totalAvailable.description: Label in the NFSC balance dialog for the total available balance.

nfscBalanceDialog.topUp.description: Button in the NFSC balance dialog to top up (add) NFSC balance.

nfscBalanceDialog.showNfscInWallet.description: Button in the NFSC balance dialog to add the NFSC token to the user's wallet so it displays there. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.fetchingBalances.description: Loading text shown in the NFSC balance dialog while balances are being fetched.

nfscBalanceDialog.emptyNoWallets.description: Empty-state message in the NFSC balance dialog when no wallet is linked/connected. Keep the literal '$NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.emptyNoBalances.description: Empty-state message in the NFSC balance dialog when no balances are detected across wallets. Keep the literal '$NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.addFunds.description: Button in the NFSC balance dialog empty state to add funds.

nfscBalanceDialog.ordersDisclaimer.description: Disclaimer in the NFSC balance dialog orders tab explaining these are credit-card NFSC top-ups, not domain orders. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.emptyOrders.description: Empty-state message in the NFSC balance dialog orders tab when there are no top-ups. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.goToPaymentMethods.description: Button/link in the NFSC balance dialog to navigate to the Payment Methods page.

nfscBalanceDialog.connectWalletToContinu.description: Prompt in the NFSC balance dialog asking the user to connect a wallet to proceed.

nfscBalanceDialog.nfscAdded.description: Success toast after adding the NFSC token to the user's wallet. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.nfscAddFailed.description: Error toast when adding the NFSC token to the wallet fails. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscBalanceDialog.nfscAddError.description: Error toast for a failure adding NFSC to the wallet. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscOrdersList.emptyMessage.description: Empty-state message in the NFSC orders list when there are no NFSC orders. Keep 'NFSC' token name untranslated.

nfscOrdersList.chainFallback.description: Fallback chain name in the NFSC orders list when the chain name is unknown. {chainId} is the numeric chain ID — keep untranslated.
